next_required_actions: PASS-0005 (O5): the largest, highest-risk, net-new pass. 5a: launch the dispatched agent as a TOP-LEVEL headless codex/claude process in its owned worktree (able to spawn its OWN subagents, NOT nested) and add POST-LAUNCH session discovery to capture the agent's OWN session id + transcript path into the O6 binding (coordinator-review correction 2: the existing dispatch-time DeepContext plumbing captures the BACKEND env, not the launched agent). 5b: external invisible liveness watchdog reading the pinned signal (transcript append growth -> last_active_signal_at, refreshed on each append, NEVER anchored to dispatch), SUSPENDED while gate-parked, one poke that ACTUALLY wakes the process (coordinator-review correction 3: no existing input-delivery mechanism; A5.3 must not be satisfied by a no-op state poke), then incident + email to admin@digitalcollective.games containing observed state + transcript (MOCK the gmail send during proof). Also closes the agent-driven A4.1/A4.2/A4.7.
